Title: Promote opportunity to project

As a account manager
I want to convert an opportunity into a project
So that qualified work moves into delivery tracking

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Opportunity cards expose a promote action.
- [ ] The user is prompted before promotion.
- [ ] The resulting project carries over available opportunity fields.
- [ ] The source opportunity is removed or updated consistently after promotion.

Notes: Exact field mapping should be verified against live data.
